title: anisomeles principis
intro: Anisomeles principis, also known as Indian hyssop, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antibacterial agent, making it a potential treatment for various infections and skin conditions. Anisomeles principis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
